queries.question: For each insurance plan, list all of the coverage we offer
queries.sql: select insurance_plan.planname , coverage.description from Insurance_Plan_Coverage join Coverage on Insurance_Plan_Coverage.CoverageID = Coverage.CoverageID join Insurance_Plan on Insurance_Plan_Coverage.PlanID = Insurance_Plan.PlanID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?planname ?description WHERE {
  ?insurance_plan_coverage a :Insurance_Plan_Coverage .
  ?coverage a :Coverage .
  ?insurance_plan_coverage p:hasCoverage ?coverage .
  ?insurance_plan a :InsurancePlans .
  ?insurance_plan_coverage p:hasInsurance_Plan ?insurance_plan .
  ?insurance_plan p:PlanName ?planname .
  ?coverage p:Description ?description .
}

queries.question: Show me the coverage that is common for all insurance plans
queries.sql: SELECT Coverage.Description  from Insurance_Plan_Coverage join Coverage on Insurance_Plan_Coverage.CoverageID = Coverage.CoverageID join Insurance_Plan on Insurance_Plan_Coverage.PlanID = Insurance_Plan.PlanID   GROUP BY Insurance_Plan_Coverage.CoverageID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Insurance_Plan_Coverage.PlanID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Insurance_Plan)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What coverage do we have for each insurance plan?
